/opt/homebrew/Cellar/emscripten/4.0.16/libexec/em++ -O2 -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=createTalNoizeMaker -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=[_tal_nm_create,_tal_nm_destroy,_tal_nm_process,_tal_nm_note_on,_tal_nm_note_off,_tal_nm_all_notes_off,_tal_nm_set_param,_tal_nm_get_param,_tal_nm_pitch_bend,_tal_nm_get_num_params,_tal_nm_set_bpm,_malloc,_free] -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=[ccall,cwrap,HEAPF32,wasmMemory] -s FILESYSTEM=0 -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s INITIAL_MEMORY=16777216 -s ENVIRONMENT=web,worker -s SINGLE_FILE=0 -s WASM=1 -s NO_EXIT_RUNTIME=1 @CMakeFiles/TalNoizeMaker.dir/objects1.rsp -o /Users/spot/Code/DEViLBOX/public/tal-noisemaker/TalNoizeMaker.js
